text: いい朝ですね☀️
translation: What a lovely morning!

text: コーヒーを飲んで始めましょう
translation: Grab a coffee and let's get started.

text: 今日も元気にいきましょう
translation: Let's take on today with energy.

text: 朝のパンはおいしいですね
translation: Morning bread just tastes better.

text: 新しい一日が始まりますよ
translation: A brand-new day is starting.

text: 窓を開けて、風を入れて
translation: Open the window and let the breeze in.

text: 今朝の空、きれいですよ
translation: The sky is beautiful this morning.

text: 起きたら水を飲んでね
translation: Drink some water when you wake up.

text: 朝は言葉がよく頭に入りますよ
translation: Words sink in best in the morning.

text: 今日は何を覚えましょうか
translation: What shall we memorize today?

text: 卵と果物もどうぞ
translation: Have some eggs and fruit too.

text: 晴れた日は散歩も楽しいね
translation: A sunny day is perfect for a stroll.

text: 鳥の声も今朝の楽しみです
translation: Birdsong is this morning's little treat.

text: 準備はできましたか
translation: All set and ready?

text: さあ、少し進みましょう
translation: Come on, let's make a little progress.

text: 熱いお茶で、心もあたたかく
translation: Hot tea to warm your heart.

text: 昨日より少し新しい自分に
translation: A slightly newer you than yesterday.

text: 明日より今、始めよう
translation: Start now, not tomorrow.

text: 昼の休みも大切ですよ
translation: Your midday break matters too.

text: 午後も続けていきましょう
translation: Let's keep it going this afternoon.

text: お弁当はもう食べましたか
translation: Had your lunch yet?

text: 甘いお菓子で元気を出して
translation: Perk up with a sweet treat.

text: 疲れたらちょっと休んでね
translation: Rest a little when you're tired.

text: 午後のコーヒー、おいしいね☕
translation: Afternoon coffee hits the spot.

text: ここから、次の一つへ
translation: Now, on to the next one.

text: 半分まで来ましたよ
translation: You're already halfway there.

text: 眠いなら立って歩こうか
translation: Sleepy? Stand up and take a walk.

text: 外に出て、空を見てね
translation: Step outside and look at the sky.

text: 復習は忘れる前にね
translation: Review before you forget.

text: あなたならきっとできるよ
translation: You can do this, I'm sure.

text: 今日も一日、よくできました ✨
translation: Another day well done.

text: 一日の終わりは、優しい気持ちで
translation: End the day on a gentle note.

text: 熱いお茶で、ちょっと休みましょう
translation: Take a short break with some hot tea.

text: 夕飯は何を食べますか
translation: What's for dinner tonight?

text: 空の色がきれいな時間だね 🌇
translation: The sky's colors are beautiful right now.

text: 仕事の後は、しっかり休んでね
translation: Rest up well after work.

text: お風呂に入って、体を大切にね 🛁
translation: Have a bath and take care of yourself.

text: 音楽を聞いて、心を静かに
translation: Put on some music and settle your mind.

text: 夕方の散歩もいいですね
translation: An evening stroll sounds nice.

text: 今日の勉強、十分ですよ
translation: You've studied plenty for today.

text: 少しの練習を、毎日続けてね
translation: A little practice every day adds up.

text: 甘いお菓子も、たまにはいいね 🍬
translation: A sweet treat once in a while is fine.

text: 今日の自分を、ほめてね
translation: Be proud of yourself today.

text: 疲れたら、無理はしないでね
translation: If you're tired, take it easy.

text: 家に帰ったら、飲み物をどうぞ
translation: Once you're home, have something to drink.

text: 窓を開けて、涼しい風を
translation: Open a window and let in the cool breeze.

text: 夜も遅いから、そろそろ寝ましょう
translation: It's getting late — time for bed.

text: いい夢を見てね 🌙
translation: Sweet dreams.

text: 電気を消して、深く眠ってね
translation: Turn off the lights and sleep deeply.

text: 明日も早いなら、もう休んでね
translation: Early start tomorrow? Better rest now.

text: 月がきれいな夜ですね 🌕
translation: The moon is beautiful tonight.

text: 静かな夜は、本を読むのにいいね
translation: A quiet night is perfect for reading.

text: 眠い目に、無理はさせないでね
translation: Don't push those sleepy eyes too hard.

text: 寝る前の飲み物は、牛乳がいいよ
translation: Milk makes a good bedtime drink.

text: 窓から星が見えますか？
translation: Can you see the stars from your window?

text: 今日はここまでで大丈夫だよ
translation: It's okay to stop here for today.

text: 夜の空気は、静かでいいね
translation: The night air is calm and nice.

text: 布団に入って、ちゃんと休んでね
translation: Get under the covers and rest properly.

text: 漢字を少し覚えたら、寝ましょう
translation: Learn a few kanji, then off to bed.

text: 部屋を暗くして、よく眠ってね 😴
translation: Make the room dark and sleep tight.

text: 今日もよくやりましたね！
translation: Great work again today!

text: たくさん覚えましたね。すごい！
translation: You memorized so much. Amazing!

text: 今日の勉強、最高でした！
translation: Today's studying was the best!

text: 言葉が毎日増えていますね
translation: Your vocabulary grows every day.

text: 覚えるのが早いですね！
translation: You are such a fast learner!

text: いい気分で続けましょう
translation: Keep going with this good feeling.

text: 頭がよく働いていますね
translation: Your brain is working really well.

text: 新しい言葉も全部覚えましたね
translation: You learned every new word.

text: 練習の結果が出ていますね
translation: Your practice is really paying off.

text: その強い心、すごいですね
translation: That strong heart of yours is impressive.

text: 今日のあなたは特別です✨
translation: You were something special today.

text: 上手になりましたね
translation: You have gotten really good at this.

text: 甘いお菓子でお祝いしましょう
translation: Celebrate with something sweet!

text: コーヒーを飲んで少し休みましょう
translation: Have a coffee and take a little break.

text: 覚えた言葉が力になりますよ
translation: Every word you learn becomes strength.

text: 毎日の勉強、楽しいですね
translation: Studying every day, and enjoying it!

text: 心に花が咲きましたね🌸
translation: A flower has bloomed in your heart.

text: よく分かっていますね。すごい！
translation: You really get it. Impressive!

text: 覚えたことを忘れませんね。すごい！
translation: You never forget what you learn. Amazing!

text: 一つ一つ、よくできました
translation: Well done, one step at a time.

text: 今日は自分にお菓子をどうぞ
translation: Treat yourself to a snack today.

text: 先生もびっくりしていますよ
translation: Even your teacher is amazed.

text: カード60以上！すごいです！
translation: Over 60 cards! Incredible!

text: 今日は山を登りましたね！
translation: You climbed a mountain today!

text: そんなにできるとは、驚きました
translation: I am stunned you did that much.

text: カードの山、全部できましたね
translation: You got through the whole pile of cards.

text: 今日は特別な一日でしたね
translation: Today was a truly special day.

text: そんな数、先生もびっくりです
translation: That number amazes even your teacher.

text: 大変な数を覚えましたね！
translation: You memorized an astonishing amount!

text: 疲れたでしょう。よく休んでね
translation: You must be tired — rest up well.

text: 今夜は甘いケーキをどうぞ🍰
translation: Treat yourself to some sweet cake tonight.

text: 無理をしないで、今日はもう寝てくださいね
translation: Don't overdo it — get some sleep tonight.

text: そこまでやる人は少ないですよ
translation: Not many people go that far.

text: 頭をたくさん使いましたね。お茶をどうぞ
translation: Your brain worked hard — have some tea.

text: 少しずつ、前に進みましょう
translation: Little by little, keep moving forward.

text: 言葉が増えるのは、楽しいね✨
translation: Watching your words grow is a joy.

text: 毎日の練習が力になります
translation: Daily practice becomes real strength.

text: 昨日より少し強い自分に
translation: A little stronger than yesterday.

text: 続けるあなたは、すごいよ
translation: The way you keep going is amazing.

text: 今日も新しい言葉に会えるよ
translation: New words are waiting to meet you today.

text: 夢が少し近くなりましたね
translation: Your dream just got a little closer.

text: 疲れたら、休んでいいんですよ
translation: If you're tired, it's okay to rest.

text: お茶を飲んで、もう一つ覚えよう
translation: Sip some tea, then learn one more.

text: 雨の日も、言葉は増えるよ
translation: Even on a rainy day, your vocabulary grows.

text: 空を見て、心を軽くしよう。
translation: Look up at the sky and lighten your heart.

text: 分からない日も、大丈夫。
translation: Days when nothing clicks are fine too.

text: 声に出すと、よく覚えますよ。
translation: Say it out loud and it sticks better.

text: 明日の自分が喜びますよ。
translation: Your future self will thank you.

text: 一日一つでも、道は続く。
translation: One a day still carries you down the road.

text: 山を登るように、少しずつね。
translation: Like climbing a mountain, step by step.

text: 花が咲くまで、続けましょう🌸
translation: Keep going until it blooms.

text: コーヒーと一緒に、今日も勉強☕
translation: Coffee in hand, let's study today too.

text: できることが、増えていますよ。
translation: You can do more than you could before.

text: 毎日の勉強が、自分を変える。
translation: Daily study changes who you are.

text: 大丈夫、あなたはできる人。
translation: Don't worry, you've got this.

text: 朝は、頭がよく働くよ。
translation: Your brain works best in the morning.

text: 散歩のように、毎日少しずつ。
translation: Like a daily stroll, a little at a time.

text: 体を大切に、無理しないでね。
translation: Take care of yourself, no need to overdo it.

text: 水を飲んで、次の言葉へ。
translation: Drink some water, then on to the next word.

text: いい天気だと、勉強も進むね。
translation: Nice weather makes the studying flow.

text: 家でも外でも、言葉は友達。
translation: At home or out and about, words are your friends.

text: 新しい世界が、だんだん見えてくるよ。
translation: A new world slowly comes into view.

text: 今夜も一つ覚えて、寝よう。
translation: Learn one more tonight, then sleep well.

text: 少しずつでも、ずっと続けよう。
translation: Even a little at a time — just keep going.

text: 今日もいい一日に。
translation: Make today a good one.

text: 水を飲んで、少し休もう。
translation: Drink some water and take a little break.

text: コーヒーの時間ですよ☕
translation: It's coffee time.

text: 雨の日も、悪くないね。
translation: Rainy days aren't so bad either.

text: 甘い物は、小さな薬。
translation: A little something sweet is its own medicine.

text: よく寝て、よく食べて。
translation: Sleep well, eat well.

text: 無理はしないでね。
translation: Don't push yourself too hard.

text: 元気が一番！
translation: Feeling good beats everything.

text: たまには空を見てみよう。
translation: Look up at the sky once in a while.

text: 猫みたいに寝るのも大事🐱
translation: A catnap counts as self-care.

text: 忙しい日は、お茶をどうぞ。
translation: Busy day? All the more reason for tea.

text: 明日は明日の風が吹く。
translation: Tomorrow's wind blows tomorrow — don't sweat it.

text: 笑うと気持ちが軽くなる。
translation: A good laugh makes the heart lighter.

text: 今日も少し前に進もう。
translation: One small step forward today.

text: 疲れたら、休んでいいよ。
translation: Tired? It's okay to rest.

text: 暑い日は冷たい水を。
translation: On hot days, grab some cold water.

text: 寒い日は、暖かい飲み物を。
translation: Cold day? Time for a warm drink.

text: 新しい言葉は、新しい友達。
translation: Every new word is a new friend.

text: 体を大切にしてね。
translation: Take good care of yourself.

text: 花を見る時間も大事です。
translation: Time spent watching flowers is time well spent.

text: 音楽と一緒だと、勉強も楽しいね。
translation: Studying is more fun with music.

text: 雨なら傘を忘れずにね☔
translation: If it looks like rain, don't forget your umbrella.

text: 窓を開けて、いい風を。
translation: Open a window and let the breeze in.

text: 眠い日は、早く帰ろうね。
translation: Sleepy day? Head home early.

text: 会えてうれしいよ。
translation: Glad to see you here.

text: 果物を食べて、元気に🍎
translation: Eat some fruit and power up.

text: 月がきれいな夜もいいね。
translation: Nights with a beautiful moon are lovely too.

text: 曇りの日も、心は晴れ。
translation: Cloudy outside, sunny inside.

text: 部屋がきれいだと、気分も晴れる。
translation: A tidy room clears the mind.

text: 外の空気もおいしいよ。
translation: The air outside tastes pretty good too.

text: 終わりはもうすぐそこですよ。
translation: The finish line is just ahead.

text: 山の上はもう見えていますよ。
translation: The summit is already in sight.

text: 夢はもう目の前ですよ
translation: Your dream is right there in front of you.

text: ここまでよく続けましたね
translation: You've kept going so well to get here.

text: 最後まで一緒に行きましょう
translation: Let's see this through to the end, together.

text: 今の力ならできますよ
translation: You're strong enough now — you've got this.

text: もうすぐ花が咲きますよ🌸
translation: Your hard work is about to bloom.

text: 道の先に光が見えますね
translation: There's light at the end of the road.

text: 新しい自分にそろそろ会えますよ
translation: You're about to meet a whole new you.

text: とうとうここまで来ましたね
translation: You've finally made it this far.

text: 次のページで終わりですよ
translation: The end is just a page away.

text: 目的の場所はすぐそこです
translation: Your destination is just around the corner.

text: 強い気持ちで最後まで
translation: Stay strong to the very end.

text: 一番いいところまで来ていますよ
translation: You're at the best part now.

text: あなたならきっとできますよ✨
translation: You can do this — no doubt about it.

text: 久しぶりですね、会えてうれしいです
translation: It's been a while — so glad to see you!

text: 待っていましたよ、どうぞ入って
translation: We've been waiting — come on in!

text: 休みも大事な時間でしたね
translation: That time away was precious time, too.

text: 元気そうで安心しましたよ
translation: You look well — what a relief.

text: 雨の日も晴れの日も、ここにいますよ
translation: Rain or shine, we're always here.

text: 今日からもう一度始めましょう
translation: Let's make today a fresh start.

text: 忙しかったですね、大丈夫ですよ
translation: Things got busy, right? No worries at all.

text: 少しずつ思い出しましょう
translation: Let's ease back in, bit by bit.

text: ドアはいつも開いていますよ
translation: The door is always open.

text: あなたの席はここにありますよ
translation: Your seat is right here waiting.

text: お茶を飲んで、ちょっとだけやりましょう🍵
translation: Grab some tea and let's do just a little.

text: カードも皆、喜んでいますよ
translation: The cards are all happy you're back.

text: 復習は軽くいきましょう
translation: We'll keep the review light today.

text: よく戻ってきましたね
translation: Welcome back — good to have you here.

text: 最初の一つだけでもいいですよ
translation: Even just the first one is plenty.

text: 休むことも勉強です
translation: Resting is part of learning, too.

text: 無理しないでね
translation: Don't push yourself too hard.

text: 疲れたら、寝るのがいちばん
translation: When you're tired, sleep is the best cure.

text: お茶を飲んで、少し休みましょう🍵
translation: Have some tea and take a little break.

text: 今夜は早く寝ましょう
translation: Head to bed early tonight.

text: 休みも大事な時間です
translation: Rest is precious time, too.

text: 明日があるから、大丈夫
translation: There's always tomorrow — you're okay.

text: 雨の日は、家で静かに
translation: On a rainy day, stay in and take it easy.

text: お風呂に入って、いい夜を
translation: Take a bath and have a good night.

text: 甘いお菓子も、薬ですよ🍬
translation: A sweet treat is good medicine, too.

text: できない日があってもいい
translation: It's okay to have days when you can't.

text: 音楽を聞いて、心を軽く🎵
translation: Put on some music and lighten your heart.

text: 今日も新しい言葉に会おう✨
translation: Let's meet some new words today.

text: 少しずつ進めば大丈夫
translation: Little steps forward are all you need.

text: 続ける人は強いよ
translation: Those who keep going grow strong.

text: 昨日の自分と比べよう
translation: Compare yourself only to yesterday's you.

text: 君ならできるよ
translation: You've got this.

text: 分かることが増えたね
translation: You understand so much more now.

text: 失敗も大切な経験です
translation: Mistakes are precious experience, too.

text: 夢まで、もう少し🌟
translation: Just a little further to your dream.

text: 練習は力になります
translation: Practice becomes real strength.

text: 声に出して読んでみよう
translation: Try reading it out loud.

text: 覚えた言葉は、君のものだよ
translation: Every word you learn is yours to keep.

text: 上手になりましたね🎉
translation: You've gotten really good at this.
